title: Applying label-free quantitation to top down proteomics.
author: Ntai I Kim K Fellers RT Skinner OS Smith AD Early BP Savaryn JP LeDuc RD Thomas PM Kelleher NL
content: S-EPMC4033644 PMC4033644 Applying label-free quantitation to top down proteomics. With the prospect of resolving whole protein molecules into their myriad proteoforms on a proteomic scale, the question of their quantitative analysis in discovery mode comes to the fore.
